product_overview: Huginn is a single-page web app where a user pastes a news article URL and receives a multi-layer analysis showing outlet ownership, author coverage patterns, narrative divergence scoring, and deterministic bias alerts. The app prioritizes resilience and transparent fallbacks when external providers are unavailable.
core_goals: Allow a user to analyze a single article URL end-to-end in one flow
Return a readable multi-layer report: ownership, author, topic map, contrast, divergence score, and alerts
Compute a reproducible narrative divergence score using vector embeddings and surface the most divergent sources
Keep the pipeline resilient with graceful degradation and expose raw JSON for auditability

features.name: URL Input Form
features.description: Homepage form to enter an article URL and start the analysis pipeline.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See URL input field with placeholder text -> Type a valid article URL into the input field -> See Analyze button enabled when input has text -> Click Analyze button to submit -> See Analyze button show "Analyzing..." and be disabled while loading
Navigate to / -> See URL input field with placeholder text -> Leave input empty -> See Analyze button disabled

Navigate to / -> See URL input field with placeholder text -> Type an invalid URL into the input field -> Click Analyze button to submit -> Receive 400 response from /api/analyze -> See red error box appear with "Error:" prefix and specific error message

features.name: Loading State
features.description: Visual feedback while the backend runs the analysis pipeline.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Type a valid article URL -> Click Analyze button to submit -> See spinning loader icon appear after submitting -> See descriptive loading message text while waiting

Navigate to / -> Type a valid article URL -> Click Analyze button to submit -> See spinning loader icon appear after submitting -> External integrations time out or backend returns 500 -> Spinner clears and see red error box appear with "Error:" prefix

features.name: Error State
features.description: Presentation of errors for validation failures and unexpected server errors.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Type an invalid URL into the input field -> Click Analyze button to submit -> Backend returns 400 with validation message -> See red error box appear with "Error:" prefix and validation details

Navigate to / -> Type a valid article URL -> Click Analyze button to submit -> Backend returns 500 due to unexpected failure -> See red error box appear with "Error:" prefix and generic server message

features.name: Summary Metrics Bar
features.description: Top-level stat cards summarizing counts produced by the analysis.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Submit a valid article URL -> Wait for analysis to complete -> See "Ownership nodes" card with numeric value -> See "Author articles" card with numeric value -> See "Active alerts" card with numeric value

Navigate to / -> Submit a valid article URL -> Analysis completes with partial data due to integration timeouts -> See one or more stat cards show placeholder or "Not available" instead of numeric values

features.name: Layer 1 — Ownership Chain Panel
features.description: Displays the media outlet, detected ownership chain, and outlet/owner bios with optional MBFC badges.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Submit a valid article URL -> Wait for analysis to complete -> See "Layer 1" tag and "Media Outlet" heading -> See Domain field with value -> See Title field with article title -> See Ownership chain field with arrow-separated values -> See Summary field for ownership summary -> See MBFC badges if MBFC_API_KEY is set and domain is indexed
Navigate to / -> Submit a valid article URL -> Wait for analysis to complete -> MBFC_API_KEY is not set or domain not indexed -> See MBFC badges omitted and no MBFC badge area displayed

features.name: Layer 2 — Author Panel
features.description: Shows the detected author, biography, coverage pattern, and a list of their articles.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Submit a valid article URL with author metadata -> Wait for analysis to complete -> See "Layer 2" tag and "Author" heading -> See Author field populated -> See Biography field if present -> See Coverage pattern field -> See articles list with source labels and clickable links -> Click an article link to open the source

Navigate to / -> Submit a valid article URL with no author metadata -> Wait for analysis to complete -> See "Layer 2" tag and "Author" heading -> See Author field show "Not found" or empty -> See Biography and articles sections show "Not available" or empty list

features.name: Layer 2.5 — Author Coverage Map
features.description: Interactive collapsible topic tree plus horizontal bar chart showing the author's topic distribution.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Submit a valid article URL for an author -> Wait for analysis to complete -> See "Layer 2.5" tag and "Author Coverage Map" heading -> See author name root node -> See topic branches with article count badges -> Click a topic branch to expand it and reveal article links -> Click the same branch again to collapse it -> See bar chart with topic distribution on the right

Navigate to / -> Submit a valid article URL -> Author coverage data absent or minimal -> Wait for analysis to complete -> See "Layer 2.5" heading -> See a message indicating no coverage data or see an empty topic tree and an empty bar chart

features.name: Layer 3 — Contrast Analysis Panel
features.description: LLM-generated paragraph that contrasts ownership, author history, and the current article framing.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Submit a valid article URL -> Wait for analysis to complete -> See "Layer 3" tag and "Contrast" heading -> See contrast analysis paragraph text

Navigate to / -> Submit a valid article URL -> OpenRouter LLM call fails or times out -> Wait for analysis to complete -> See "Layer 3" tag and "Contrast" heading -> See contrast field display "Not available" or equivalent fallback text

features.name: Layer 4 — Narrative Divergence Panel
features.description: Shows divergence score, progress bar, interpretation, and the top divergent author sources computed from embeddings.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Submit a valid article URL -> Wait for analysis to complete -> See "Layer 4" tag and "Narrative Divergence" heading -> See numeric score (0–100) displayed -> See color-coded progress bar reflect score -> See interpretation text explaining the score range -> See global and author snippet counts -> See list of most divergent sources with score badges and clickable links -> Click a divergent source link to open the source

Navigate to / -> Submit a valid article URL -> GOOGLE_AI_API_KEY missing or Gemini embeddings fail -> Wait for analysis to complete -> See "Layer 4" tag and "Narrative Divergence" heading -> See score show "Not available" or null interpretation -> See divergent sources list empty

features.name: Layer 5 — Bias Alerts Panel
features.description: Deterministic rule-based alerts with severity badges and messages.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Submit a valid article URL -> Wait for analysis to complete -> See "Alerts" tag and "Bias Alerts Detected" heading -> See one or more alerts each with a colored severity badge (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW) -> See alert code text and alert message text

Navigate to / -> Submit a valid article URL -> Wait for analysis to complete -> No deterministic rules fire -> See "Alerts" tag and "Bias Alerts Detected" heading -> See an empty alerts list or a message indicating no alerts detected

features.name: Raw JSON Inspector
features.description: Expandable collapsible section exposing the full raw JSON response for auditability.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Submit a valid article URL -> Wait for analysis to complete -> See "Raw JSON" summary text collapsed by default -> Click to expand -> See JSON displayed in a scrollable pre block -> Click again to collapse the JSON

Navigate to / -> Submit a valid article URL -> Wait for analysis to complete -> Raw JSON arrays are empty due to integrations returning no data -> Click to expand -> See JSON shown with empty arrays and object placeholders

features.name: Header and Footer
features.description: Sticky header with HUGINN branding and footer with external links to GitHub and X.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See HUGINN title and subtitle in sticky header -> See "Live Analysis" badge in header -> Scroll down and see footer with copyright text -> See GitHub link and X link in footer -> Click GitHub link to open the repository
Navigate to / -> See HUGINN header and footer -> Click X link in footer to open external site -> External site is unavailable or blocked by the browser -> See browser error or failed navigation

routes.description: Single-page app — URL input form and full analysis results

features.name: URL Input Form
features.description: Input field and Analyze button for submitting a news article URL
user_interactions: See URL input field with placeholder text
Type a URL into the input field
See Analyze button disabled when input is empty
See Analyze button enabled when input has text
Click Analyze button to submit
See Analyze button show "Analyzing..." and be disabled while loading

features.name: Loading State
features.description: Spinner and status message shown while analysis is running
user_interactions: See spinning loader icon appear after submitting
See descriptive loading message text

features.name: Error State
features.description: Red error banner shown when URL is invalid or analysis fails
user_interactions: See red error box appear with "Error:" prefix
See specific error message text

features.name: Summary Metrics Bar
features.description: Three stat cards showing counts after analysis completes
user_interactions: See "Ownership nodes" card with numeric value
See "Author articles" card with numeric value
See "Active alerts" card with numeric value

features.name: Layer 1 — Ownership Chain Panel
features.description: Shows domain, title, ownership chain, summary, and optional MBFC badges
user_interactions: See "Layer 1" tag and "Media Outlet" heading
See Domain field with value
See Title field with article title
See Ownership chain field (arrow-separated or "Not found")
See Summary field
See MBFC badges if available (Bias, Factual, Credibility)

features.name: Layer 2 — Author Panel
features.description: Shows author name, biography, coverage pattern, and article list
user_interactions: See "Layer 2" tag and "Author" heading
See Author field
See Biography field if present
See Coverage pattern field
See articles list with source labels and clickable links

features.name: Layer 2.5 — Author Coverage Map
features.description: Collapsible topic tree with branch expand/collapse and bar chart
user_interactions: See "Layer 2.5" tag and "Author Coverage Map" heading
See author name root node
See topic branches with article count badges
Click a topic branch to expand it and reveal article links
Click the same branch again to collapse it
See bar chart with topic distribution on the right

features.name: Layer 3 — Contrast Analysis Panel
features.description: AI-generated contrast paragraph
user_interactions: See "Layer 3" tag and "Contrast" heading
See contrast analysis paragraph text

features.name: Layer 4 — Narrative Divergence Panel
features.description: Score, progress bar, interpretation, and divergent sources list
user_interactions: See "Layer 4" tag and "Narrative Divergence" heading
See numeric score or "Not available" message
See color-coded progress bar
See interpretation text
See global and author snippet counts
See list of most divergent sources with score badges and links

features.name: Layer 5 — Bias Alerts Panel
features.description: Alert list with HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW severity badges
user_interactions: See "Alerts" tag and "Bias Alerts Detected" heading
See each alert with a colored severity badge (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW)
See alert code text
See alert message text

features.name: Raw JSON Inspector
features.description: Collapsible details element with full JSON response
user_interactions: See "Raw JSON" summary text collapsed by default
Click to expand and see JSON in scrollable pre block
Click again to collapse

features.name: Header and Footer
features.description: Sticky header with HUGINN branding and footer with GitHub and X links
user_interactions: See HUGINN title and subtitle in sticky header
See "Live Analysis" badge in header
See footer with copyright text
See GitHub link in footer
See X / Twitter link in footer

known_limitations.issue: MBFC badges only appear when MBFC_API_KEY is set and domain is indexed
known_limitations.impact: Layer 1 shows no MBFC badges for unlisted outlets or missing key

known_limitations.issue: Divergence score shows "Not available" when GOOGLE_AI_API_KEY is missing
known_limitations.impact: Layer 4 score section is replaced with a plain text message

known_limitations.issue: Analysis takes 10-30 seconds with no streaming
known_limitations.impact: User sees spinner until all external calls complete
